title: The Wandering Illagers
description: You thought you could trust those greedy traders? Not with this mod! - Adds the Wandering Illager
body:
![Title Image The Wandering Illagers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5a5cf6bbd43287c2d8552248c73695a19224c694.png)

**You thought you could trust the Wandering Traders? Not with this mod!**

----------------------------------------
☕ You can find my **ko-fi link** on this page, maybe think about **supporting**. This would be **huge** ❤️

[![ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/img/githubbutton_sm.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/W7W51CDJU1)

----------------------------------------

**"The Wandering Illagers" adds one mob: The Wandering Illager**  
It disguises as a normal Wandering Trader until you attack it or open the trade menu, then it transforms into the Wandering Illager, with special attacks and an **interesting drop**...
![The Illager Tent with the Wandering Illager and the Wandering Gem inside](https://i.imgur.com/TC8eAca.png)

For background lore look at the wiki :D

----------------------------------------

Everything added:
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![Wandering Fragments, Faded Gem, Wandering Gem, Wandering Illager](https://i.imgur.com/CTYEWKl.png)

</details>


----------------------------------------

🔁 Feel free to **modify** this mod, the **source code is available on my github** :) (but please **don't just repost**)
